enquire_deliveries_by_scenario.name: Enquire Deliveries By Scenario
enquire_deliveries_by_scenario.description: Debugging assistant to show list of deliveries for each scenario, including default usage

user.title: SuperNotify

data_description.template_path: Optional location where Jinja2 templates for HTML email are to be found
data_description.media_path: Storage path for media created during notifications, for example camera snapshots created for attachments

user.description: Set up SuperNotify global settings. Deliveries and scenarios are still configured in YAML for now and will get their own UI in a later phase.

reconfigure.title: SuperNotify settings
reconfigure.description: Update SuperNotify global settings. Deliveries and scenarios are managed separately.

data_description.template_path: Optional location where Jinja2 templates for HTML email are to be found
data_description.media_path: Storage path for media created during notifications, for example camera snapshots created for attachments

abort.already_configured: SuperNotify is already configured. Only one instance is supported.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: This does not match the existing SuperNotify configuration.

scenario_delivery.title: Invalid Delivery for Scenario
scenario_delivery.description: Scenario definition {scenario} refers to a delivery {delivery} that doesn't exist in supernotify configuration

scenario_action_group.title: Invalid Mobile Action Group for Scenario
scenario_action_group.description: Scenario definition {scenario} refers to a delivery {action_group} that doesn't exist in supernotify configuration

scenario_condition.title: Invalid Condition for Scenario
scenario_condition.description: Scenario definition {scenario} contains a condition that cannor be evaluated by Home Assistant

delivery_unknown_transport.title: Unknown Transport for Delivery
delivery_unknown_transport.description: Delivery configuration {delivery} refers to a transport {transport} that is not provided by SuperNotify

media_path.title: Media Path Cannot be Used
media_path.description: A path ({path}) has been provided for holding media such as camera snapshots during notifications but cannot be used (error: {error})

delivery_reserved_name.title: Delivery Has Reserved Delivery Name
delivery_reserved_name.description: The delivery {delivery} name is reserved for Supernotify use

delivery_invalid_action.title: Delivery Has Invalid Action
delivery_invalid_action.description: The delivery {delivery} has an invalid action {action}

delivery_invalid_condition.title: Delivery Has Invalid Condition
delivery_invalid_condition.description: The {delivery} delivery has an invalid condition {condition}

options.dupe_policy_message_title_same_or_lower_: Same message & title, same or lower priority
